channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in JavaScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 DietrichGebert/ponytail (78290 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DietrichGebert

📝 Repository: DietrichGebert/ponytail

📄 Descrizione: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

⭐ Stelle: 78290

🍴 Forks: 4179

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents claude claude-code claude-code-plugin cursor-rules developer-tools llm prompt-engineering yagni

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T00:52:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T06:03:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📜 cobusgreyling/loop-engineering (6463 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cobusgreyling

📝 Repository: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering

📄 Descrizione: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

⭐ Stelle: 6463

🍴 Forks: 826

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agentic-ai ai-agents ai-coding anthropic automation claude claude-code codex coding-agents devops-automation devtools github-actions grok llm loop-engineering mcp prompt-engineering

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-09T06:28:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-08T05:11:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: kadevin

📝 Repository: kadevin/ilab-gpt-conjure

📄 Descrizione: 面向 GPT-image-2 的 AI 图片生成 WebUI 工作台，支持 Codex Responses 与 OpenAI 兼容 API 接入，内置公用图库、多类型 Chip 快捷引用、提示词模板、多任务并发和本地队列管理。An AI image generation WebUI workbench for GPT-image-2 with Codex Responses and OpenAI-compatible API support, shared gallery references, multi-type quick chips, prompt templates, concurrent tasks, and local queue management.

⭐ Stelle: 617

🍴 Forks: 83

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-art ai-image-generation cli codex fastapi generative-ai gpt-image-2 image-editing image-generation img2img macos openai openai-compatible prompt-engineering prompt-templates python reference-images responses-api webui windows

item.title: 📜 Archive228/loopkit (389 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Archive228

📝 Repository: Archive228/loopkit

📄 Descrizione: 33 battle-tested skills + minimal .claude harness for any coding agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI).

item.title: 📜 NotASithLord/peerd (330 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NotASithLord

📝 Repository: NotASithLord/peerd

📄 Descrizione: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A browser extension that runs a full agent loop where you already work: it drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK, no backend, no telemetry.

⭐ Stelle: 330

🍴 Forks: 36

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agentic ai-agent browser-extension chrome-extension firefox-extension llm manifest-v3 p2p webassembly webrtc

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-22T05:55:13Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-08T02:37:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
